appTagline: Real-time crossing time monitoring — Autonomous Port of Abidjan

carte.title: Real-time map
carte.subtitle: Live status of the 6 monitored segments.
carte.placeholder: The Leaflet map will be embedded here (next P4 step).

indicateurs.title: Performance indicators
indicateurs.subtitle: TTI, PTI, BTI — FHWA standard. Comparison over rolling 30 / 60 / 90 day windows.
indicateurs.ttiTooltip: Ratio between average travel time and free-flow reference time.
indicateurs.ptiTooltip: Ratio between 95th percentile and free-flow time — buffer needed to arrive on time 95% of the time.
indicateurs.btiTooltip: Buffer margin as a percentage of the average.
indicateurs.placeholder: Recharts visualizations will be added here.
indicateurs.courbeSubtitle: Traffic time, free-flow time and 50 km/h reference (sky blue).
indicateurs.heatmapSubtitle: Average congestion intensity per slot (historical + real-time data).
indicateurs.evolutionSubtitle: Comparison between official campaigns (article 4.4 of the requirements).

fiabilite.title: Source reliability
fiabilite.subtitle: Weekly cross-check of Google Routes durations against GPX field recordings.
fiabilite.placeholder: Comparison table with imported GPX files will be added here.

prediction.title: Prediction & optimal time
prediction.subtitle: Future travel time estimation from historical hourly profiles.
prediction.placeholder: Prediction components (P6.2 / P6.3) will be embedded here.

administration.title: Administration
administration.subtitle: Segment registry management, collection robot status, exports.
